warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
A fukui reactivity analysis was performed on ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB semi-empirical tight-binding method (xtb) in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz` file.

The most electrophilic site was identified as the Iron atom (Fe, atom label 11) with a fukui f+ index of 0.22885.
The most nucleophilic site was also identified as the Iron atom (Fe, atom label 11) with a fukui f- index of 0.25938.

The calculation successfully converged.
